feat.failure: You slide down 60 feet or to the ground without taking falling damage.
feat.name: Feral Scramble
feat.prerequisite: *Werecreature Dedication*; your animal shape grants a claw unarmed attack
feat.requirement: You’re in hybrid or animal shape.
feat.text: Sinking your claws in, you propel yourself at shocking speed. You Climb up to your land Speed and make a claw Strike at any point during that movement. After you finish the movement, attempt an Athletics check against the surface's Climb DC.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
